mxlibrary: [{"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Three-pole source + PEN (3_pen_pravy)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 100, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Three-pole source + N + PE"}, {"xml": "", "w": 30, "h": 50, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Ground (ground1)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 20, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Chassis"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Single-pole source + PE +N"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 40, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Single-pole source +PEN"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 40, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Single-pole source + neutral"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Three-pole source"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 100, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Three-pole source + PE +N"}, {"xml": "", "w": 50, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Three-pole source + PEN (src_3p_pen)"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Three-pole source + neutral"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 80, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Three-pole source + PE"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 20, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Neutral source"}, {"xml": "", "w": 40, "h": 20, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Phase source"}, {"xml": "", "w": 80, "h": 100, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Distribution point TN-C TN-S"}, {"xml": "", "w": 20, "h": 30, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Ground (terre)"}]
